creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:

Date: Mon Oct  1 03:02:08 2012

Log:
  - Update to 0.6.2 [1]
  - Update to new header

   * Adds iconv charset conversion and 64-bit little-endian fixes.
  
  PR:		ports/172191 [1]
